goal: Ship v7.2 Work Execution Packet as the bounded execution-claim contract.
risk: AOF may treat scattered artifacts as proof of execution when the handoff, verification, and stop decision are not reconstructable.
loss_boundary: No execution-ready or release-ready claim without a resolvable Work Execution Packet.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the work execution packet gate for v7.2
evidence_plan: schema, writer, audit, CLI wiring, tests, Council review
stop_conditions: stop if packet cannot link task, context, actor handoff, lineage, verification, and stop/continue decision
